title: DWS Manual Schema Hints
description: Agent-editable, human-reviewed inputs that expose an existing public Cobra leaf through DWS Schema and optionally correct the Schema projection of its existing flags. This file never creates commands, flags, or interfaces.

$schema.description: Keep this relative reference so editors and coding agents can discover this contract without network access.

commands.description: Exact, reviewed Cobra leaves to expose or refine. Go validation rejects duplicate cli_path values and stale command or flag references.

cli_path.description: Exact path of an existing public runnable Cobra leaf, without flags or wildcard characters. Prefer omitting the leading 'dws'.

canonical_path.description: Stable product.tool identity exposed by dws schema. It must not conflict with an identity already attached to the Cobra command.

reason.description: Reviewable explanation of why this command or parameter projection belongs in the stable Agent Schema. Describe intent, not implementation mechanics.

reviewed.description: Must be true. Unreviewed entries fail generation.

parameters.description: Optional Schema-only corrections keyed by an existing Cobra flag name without '--'. These values do not change Cobra help, flag types, or execution validation.

description.description: Agent-facing CLI parameter description. State accepted input and conditions concisely; do not copy secrets or runtime-discovered content.

property.description: Interface payload property populated by this existing CLI flag.

interface_type.description: Type after CLI-to-interface conversion. This does not change the real Cobra flag type.

required.description: Whether the flag is unconditionally required in the Agent-facing CLI contract. This does not add or remove Cobra execution validation.

required_when.description: Concise condition under which the flag is required. Use this instead of required=true for conditional requirements.

commands.reason: Expose the existing smart-category helper and preserve its reviewed CLI-to-interface parameter projection.
